title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as the Colosseum block battle reaches a brutal finish, setting up the tournament’s next stage and sharpening Luffy’s path toward the fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmmmph!! Brainless fighters will never be more than pawns on the battle- field!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm leaving this to you, long-leg man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And with your back turned to me, I'll be the one to end you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And the strategist, Dagama, is also out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: From the very start, I knew that a fishy character like you...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, on the other side of the ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our dear Bellamy!!! He's on his last legs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: His opponent ... it's that damn guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This guy... what the hell kind of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's just like with hack! Bellamy took damage from his own attack !!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: You are really pissing us off, Barto- LOMEO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's nothing as unreliable as a king out in the open...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've all just been itching to take your head

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: All that remains is to let it fly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You were the ones who protected me with that for- nation....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's nothing as dangerous as an unsheathed blade....!!! Am I wrong, brat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I heard once, in the news

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: that he annhilated an enemy fortress with a single punch!!...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid! He must have used a weapon or something, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: But, on the off- chance that it's true....!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
